task.summary: Default task
added more of the audio pack
added more of audio pack 2
troubleshooting zombies hearing gunshots
functioning zombie AI hearing
Implemented successful weapon gunshot sounds, re-enabled casing sounds
fixed multiplayer RPC to account for remote clients and possible future dedicated server. Also fixed tail and stop cues not implemented
This will be a revert spot, after this i will be switching to thrid person
troubleshooting reloading for server and client
fixed reload mechanics
Fixed zombie attack animations
Setup zombie spawn manager
pushing addtional unversioned files from last commit that didn't make it
setup parts of zombie horde system
setup zombie spawn events with an objective for them to go to
same as last, with unversioned files
commit after thread 4 fixes
working through thread 6 - loadout and savegame - commit before revision
Finished phase 1 of inventory/item system
finished phase 2 of inventory/item system
Finished phase 3 of inventory/ui plan
commit halway through phase 4
another fresh commit before finishing phase 4
finished phase 2 of inventory/item system 5/13
Finished phase 2 and 3 of recent revised UI Inventory plan
This commit is the last changes before completely revising inventory to be more similar to Ghost Recon Breakpoint style customization and loadouts in menus.
Removed most/if not all of inventory system.

Revert "This commit is the last changes before completely revising inventory to be more similar to Ghost Recon Breakpoint style customization and loadouts in menus."
This reverts commit c3a2610f
Removal of inventory system. This is the start point from here on out for the rest of project.

Finished Phase 1A of gameplay plan. After this phase, a player can aim at any actor implementing IInteractable, see a prompt, press a key, and trigger a server-validated interaction — all in multiplayer. Every piece is designed to support doors, containers, vehicles, and travel points in future phases without structural changes.
finished phase 1b of gameplay structure plan
mid phase 1c completion, fixing prompt before proceeding
Still in process of phase 1c, imported infima animations and need this to be committed
Created duplicates of Infima animations in editor
Finished major amounts of importing Infima animations to my project, renaming and reassigning animations
Milestone 5 completed
mid milestone 6 updated commit for troubleshooting animations
finish phase 1 of current animation integration plan
finished phase 2
commit before phase 3 official start
finished phase 3
midway through phase 4 6/17 at 7:21pm
complete phase 4
mid phase 5 commit 6/20 at 9:26
still in phase 5, troubleshooting weapon placement
Starting new method of analyzing and copying BPs over to C++ for implementation from Infima Pack
mid anim redo
mid anim redo
added claude.md
used claude to address issues after switching to ue5.8. this is the point moving forward

MESSAGE.value: Finished phase 2 and 3 of recent revised UI Inventory plan
This commit is the last changes before completely revising inventory to be more similar to Ghost Recon Breakpoint style customization and loadouts in menus.
Removed most/if not all of inventory system.

Revert "This commit is the last changes before completely revising inventory to be more similar to Ghost Recon Breakpoint style customization and loadouts in menus."
This reverts commit c3a2610f
Removal of inventory system. This is the start point from here on out for the rest of project.

Finished Phase 1A of gameplay plan. After this phase, a player can aim at any actor implementing IInteractable, see a prompt, press a key, and trigger a server-validated interaction — all in multiplayer. Every piece is designed to support doors, containers, vehicles, and travel points in future phases without structural changes.
finished phase 1b of gameplay structure plan
mid phase 1c completion, fixing prompt before proceeding
Still in process of phase 1c, imported infima animations and need this to be committed
Created duplicates of Infima animations in editor
Finished major amounts of importing Infima animations to my project, renaming and reassigning animations
Milestone 5 completed
mid milestone 6 updated commit for troubleshooting animations
finish phase 1 of current animation integration plan
finished phase 2
commit before phase 3 official start
finished phase 3
midway through phase 4 6/17 at 7:21pm
complete phase 4
mid phase 5 commit 6/20 at 9:26
still in phase 5, troubleshooting weapon placement
Starting new method of analyzing and copying BPs over to C++ for implementation from Infima Pack
mid anim redo
added claude.md
used claude to address issues after switching to ue5.8. this is the point moving forward

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: used claude to address issues after switching to ue5.8. this is the point moving forward
